trans-unit.source: Minimum purchase amount to activate this plan
trans-unit.target: Minimum purchase amount to activate this plan

trans-unit.source: Maximum purchase amount to activate this plan
trans-unit.target: Maximum purchase amount to activate this plan

trans-unit.source: Use relative values to set the order on the checkout page
trans-unit.target: Use relative values to set the order on the checkout page

trans-unit.source: Your cart is not eligible for payments with Alma.
trans-unit.target: Your cart is not eligible for payments with Alma.

trans-unit.source: Your order state to sync refund with Alma
trans-unit.target: Your order state to sync refund with Alma

trans-unit.source: Fast and secure payment by credit card.
trans-unit.target: Fast and secure payment by credit card.

trans-unit.source: Message displayed on an excluded product page or on the cart page if it contains an excluded product.
trans-unit.target: Message displayed on an excluded product page or on the cart page if it contains an excluded product.

trans-unit.source: Use Test mode until you are ready to take real orders with Alma. In Test mode, only admins can see Alma on cart/checkout pages.
trans-unit.target: Use Test mode until you are ready to take real orders with Alma. In Test mode, only admins can see Alma on cart/checkout pages.

trans-unit.source: Not required for Test mode – You can find your Live API key on %1$syour Alma dashboard%2$s
trans-unit.target: Not required for Test mode – You can find your Live API key on %1$syour Alma dashboard%2$s

trans-unit.source: Not required for Live mode – You can find your Test API key on %1$syour sandbox dashboard%2$s
trans-unit.target: Not required for Live mode – You can find your Test API key on %1$syour sandbox dashboard%2$s

trans-unit.source: Display even if the cart is not eligible
trans-unit.target: Display even if the cart is not eligible

trans-unit.source: Let your customers pay with Alma in a secure pop-up, without leaving your site. Learn more.
trans-unit.target: Let your customers pay with Alma in a secure pop-up, without leaving your site. Learn more.

trans-unit.source: Advanced [Optional] CSS selector used by our scripts to identify the Alma payment button
trans-unit.target: Advanced [Optional] CSS selector used by our scripts to identify the Alma payment button

trans-unit.source: Advanced [Optional] CSS selector used by our scripts to identify the payment confirmation button
trans-unit.target: Advanced [Optional] CSS selector used by our scripts to identify the payment confirmation button

trans-unit.source: Display even if the product is not eligible
trans-unit.target: Display even if the product is not eligible

trans-unit.source: If you usually refund orders by changing their state, activate this option and choose the state you want to use to trigger refunds on Alma payments
trans-unit.target: If you usually refund orders by changing their state, activate this option and choose the state you want to use to trigger refunds on Alma payments

trans-unit.source: With Alma, you can make your refunds directly from your PrestaShop back-office. Go to your order to find the new Alma section. %sMore information on how to use it%s.
trans-unit.target: With Alma, you can make your refunds directly from your PrestaShop back-office. Go to your order to find the new Alma section. %sMore information on how to use it%s.

trans-unit.source: Some products (gift cards, license keys, software, weapons, ...) cannot be sold with Alma, as per %sour terms%s (see Exclusions paragraph).
trans-unit.target: Some products (gift cards, license keys, software, weapons, ...) cannot be sold with Alma, as per %sour terms%s (see Exclusions paragraph).

trans-unit.source: If you are selling such products on your shop, you need to configure Alma so that it is not enabled when customers view or shop them.
trans-unit.target: If you are selling such products on your shop, you need to configure Alma so that it is not enabled when customers view or shop them.

trans-unit.source: Use the %scategory exclusions page%s to comply with these restrictions.
trans-unit.target: Use the %scategory exclusions page%s to comply with these restrictions.

trans-unit.source: Edit the text displayed when choosing the payment method in your checkout. It will adapt to the languages of your site.
trans-unit.target: Edit the text displayed when choosing the payment method in your checkout. It will adapt to the languages of your site.

trans-unit.source: This widget allows you to inform your customers of the availability of Alma's payment facilities right from the product page, which will help to increase your conversion rate. For more details on its configuration or in case of problems, please consult %sthis documentation%s.
trans-unit.target: This widget allows you to inform your customers of the availability of Alma's payment facilities right from the product page, which will help to increase your conversion rate. For more details on its configuration or in case of problems, please consult %sthis documentation%s.

trans-unit.source: Widget when Alma payments are available for this product.
trans-unit.target: Widget when Alma payments are available for this product.

trans-unit.source: Widget when Alma payments are not available for this product.
trans-unit.target: Widget when Alma payments are not available for this product.
